# Vendored calibre AZW3 converter

This directory contains only the calibre 8.16.2 code that is used to generate AZW3 files.

Some files have been modified to work outside of the original calibre environment.

The original module hierarchy is retained to keep upstream changes easy to compare.

The pure-Python portions of `css-parser`, `msgpack`, `python-dateutil`, and `six` are vendored because calibre imports them during conversion.

## Local changes

The imported source is intentionally close to upstream calibre, but several local adaptations are required so that the converter can run inside the Standard Ebooks toolset instead of through the external `calibre` binary.

- Conversion is invoked directly from Python. `__init__.py` configures calibre’s runtime paths, selects the EPUB input and AZW3 output plugins, and runs the conversion pipeline without starting `calibre-debug` or another subprocess. Related upstream adaptations are in `calibre/customize/ui.py` and `calibre/startup.py`.

- The calibre startup environment is reduced to the pieces needed for ebook conversion. The main files involved are `calibre/startup.py`, `calibre/customize/ui.py`, `calibre/utils/safe_atexit.py`, and `six.py`.

- Generated identifiers are deterministic. ASIN, CDE content key, PalmDB timestamp, MOBI UID, EXTH UUID, start-reading identifiers, short UUIDs, and font-obfuscation bytes are derived from the Standard Ebooks identifier instead of random UUIDs. The main files involved are `calibre/utils/standardebooks.py`, `calibre/utils/short_uuid.py`, `calibre/ebooks/mobi/writer8/mobi.py`, `calibre/ebooks/mobi/writer8/exth.py`, `calibre/ebooks/mobi/utils.py`, and `calibre/ebooks/oeb/transforms/structure.py`.

- Ordering that affects generated output is made deterministic. Manifest traversal, generated CSS, page-break selector application, and discarded-anchor restoration are sorted where needed so output does not depend on Python hash randomization. The main files involved are `calibre/ebooks/oeb/base.py`, `calibre/ebooks/oeb/transforms/flatcss.py`, and `calibre/ebooks/oeb/transforms/split.py`.

- Page-break splitting is adjusted to be deterministic while preserving the CSS meaning of elements that have both `break-before` and `break-after`. This can intentionally differ from old external-calibre output when that output depended on unordered selector application. The main file involved is `calibre/ebooks/oeb/transforms/split.py`.

- Binary calibre extension dependencies are replaced with pure-Python equivalents for the subset used by AZW3 conversion. This includes ICU helpers, image helpers, safe-exit hooks, and other small extension shims. The main files involved are `calibre/utils/icu.py`, `calibre/utils/img.py`, `calibre/utils/safe_atexit.py`, and the files in `calibre_extensions/`.

- Image processing uses Pillow directly. The vendored image helpers implement the scaling, encoding, and optimization behavior needed by the converter without relying on calibre’s compiled image extension. The main files involved are `calibre/utils/img.py` and `calibre/ebooks/mobi/utils.py`.

- PalmDOC compression uses calibre’s pure-Python compressor with local parity fixes for the records generated by this workflow. The main file involved is `calibre/ebooks/compression/palmdoc.py`.

- Metadata and OPF handling are narrowed to the behavior needed by Standard Ebooks builds, including direct control of Kindle-specific metadata values that were previously rewritten after Calibre generated the AZW3. The main files involved are `calibre/ebooks/metadata/opf2.py`, `calibre/ebooks/oeb/reader.py`, and `calibre/ebooks/mobi/writer8/exth.py`.

## Ebooks useful for testing this module

- edward-gibbon_the-history-of-the-decline-and-fall-of-the-roman-empire

- laurence-sterne_the-life-and-opinions-of-tristram-shandy-gentleman

- charles-babbage_passages-from-the-life-of-a-philosopher

- edward-whymper_scrambles-amongst-the-alps-in-the-years-1860-69

- hilaire-belloc_the-path-to-rome

- james-joyce_ulysses

- apsley-cherry-garrard_the-worst-journey-in-the-world

- beatrix-potter_short-fiction

- edward-lear_nonsense-books

- lewis-carroll_a-tangled-tale

- w-b-yeats_poetry

- george-macdonald_unspoken-sermons
